title: Pyrus deflexa
taxonomy: Pyrus deflexa is classified within the family Rosaceae, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the rose family. This family includes a wide range of plants, including fruit trees like apples and pears. Pyrus deflexa is specifically placed within the genus Pyrus, which comprises various species of pear trees. The genus Pyrus is further divided into several species, with Pyrus deflexa being one of them. Within the Pyrus genus, Pyrus deflexa is considered to be a unique species due to its distinct characteristics.
